title: Vector / SFPU
desc: Negative-control SFPU power probe: loops SFPMAD into the T0/UNPACK instruction FIFO from BRISC. SFPU ops belong on T1/MATH and need SFPENCC/SFPCONFIG bring-up first (device_setup), which a BRISC overlay skips; cannot be fixed in place (see sfpu.c). For real vector work use the TRISC LLK lane: llk/eltwise_unary_sfpu_perf.
